component.name: Trackora
component.summary: Privacy-focused activity and screen time tracker for GNOME Wayland

description.p: Trackora is a modern, privacy-first activity and screen time tracker designed specifically for the GNOME desktop. It helps you understand how you spend your time on your computer by securely tracking your active applications and windows, completely offline.

ul.li: Automatic Time Tracking: Automatically records your active applications and focused window titles without manual logging.
Privacy First: All tracking data is stored locally on your machine in a private database. No cloud services, no tracking servers, and no data sharing.
Interactive Dashboard: View beautiful visual charts of your daily, weekly, and monthly computer usage.
Productivity Insights: Identify time sinks, track screen time goals, and analyze your productivity patterns over time.
